calendar.matters:
Hearing On Order Of Examination After Civil Bench Warrant Issued And Served On Judgment Debtor Vanessa Carias.
Off Calendar Aug-26-2013 Text Ruling

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jul-10-2013 No Appearance; Order To Arrest

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar May-15-2013 Continued For Letter To Jul-10-13 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-28-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-24-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Dave Davenport.
David Wasserman, Esq. for Plaintiff: William Downing, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant Vanessa Carias as follows:
Principal: $31,000.00; Costs: $395.50 for a total judgment of $31,395.50.
Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-14-2005 Continued To May-24-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
